nasb.text: Therefore Thomas, who is called Didymus, said to his fellow disciples, “Let us also go, so that we may die with Him.”

esv.text: So Thomas, called the Twin, said to his fellow disciples, “Let us also go, that we may die with him.”

cnv.text: 那稱為“雙生子”的多馬，對其他的門徒說：“我們也去跟他一同死吧！”

ccb.text: 绰号“双胞胎”的多马对其他门徒说：“我们也去，好跟祂一块儿死吧。”

csbs.text: 那叫迪杜马的多马，对其他门徒说：“我们也去吧，让我们与主一起死！”
